notes: Operator decision 2026-07-16: axport corpus is usable for this side project. Tinker may receive scrubbed uploads. Other providers stay denied until explicitly opened. 2026-07-19 Stage-4 closeout: axport-all-available scrubbed+canary-tested; Stage-5 promoted to unlock Stage-6 env-qual (Prime upload still deferred until operator opens it).

tinker.retention_summary: Side-project acceptance: Thinking Machines Tinker trains remotely; treat uploads as disclosure. Prefer scrubbed JSONL only. Revisit if Conway employer policy changes.

prime.retention_summary: Deferred — open when Stage 6 RL needs it.

modal.retention_summary: Deferred — open only if research pods need private traces.

hf.retention_summary: Do not push private axport-derived datasets public.

data_slices.notes: 2026-07-16: operator OK; scrubbed slices axport_conway_v1.jsonl and axport_full_v2(_singleturn).jsonl for Tinker. Full R2 export under Stage-4 filters. 2026-07-19 closeout: canary_tested=true after pre-upload-gate + Stage-5 upload path; see 04-data-factory/audit-metrics.md.
